name: Awareness Group, Inc.
business: TAG is an integrated infrastructure and service provider to the alternative-energy industry, delivering support services through the TAG GRID platform to enable solar sales organizations and licensed contractors to develop and deploy residential and commercial solar energy projects. The company does not perform installations or employ solar sales agents, instead supporting customers through five interconnected business units: TAG Financial Services, TAG Capital, TAG Construction, TAG Distribution, and the TAG Dealer & Broker Network.

exposures.sentence: TAG is an integrated infrastructure and service provider to the alternative-energy industry.
TAG Financial Services: Supports sales organizations and EPCs by preparing contracts, structuring financing solutions, performing quality assurance and sales closings, and servicing consumer loans.
Candela Coin. A technology-driven subsidiary that integrates blockchain and Internet-of-Things (IoT) infrastructure into the Company's renewable-energy ecosystem.
